auth.sendVerificationCode: We'll send you a verification code
auth.invalidPhone: Invalid phone number. Please check and try again.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth.appVerificationFailed: App verification failed. Please try again.
auth.couldNotSendCode: Could not send verification code. Please try again.

camera.needsCameraAccess: GASP needs camera and microphone access to capture moments and reactions
camera.microphoneRequiredBody: GASP needs microphone access to record videos. Please enable it in Settings.
camera.recordingFailedBody: Could not start video recording. Please try again.

inbox.noGasps: No gasps yet. Send one to a friend!

gasps.noGasps: No gasps yet. Send one to a friend!
gasps.sendGaspToFriend: Send a gasp to a friend!

reaction.reactionVideoTap: Reaction video, tap to view composite
reaction.enhancedUnavailableBody: Enhanced view unavailable, so we sent the reaction video.

chat.startConversation: Start the conversation by sending a gasp!

sendGasp.errorServerMessage: Something hiccuped on our side. Want to try again?
sendGasp.errorNetworkMessage: Check your internet and try again.
sendGasp.errorRateLimitMessage: Too many sends in a row. Wait a few seconds before trying again.
sendGasp.errorUploadMessage: Your photo or video didn't make it. Try again from the camera.
sendGasp.errorGenericMessage: Please try again or pick another friend.

viewGasp.needsFrontCamera: GASP needs your front camera and microphone to capture your reaction while viewing
viewGasp.reactionUploadFailed: Your reaction video could not be uploaded. Please try again.
viewGasp.uploadFailedBody: Could not upload your reaction. Please try again.
viewGasp.missingConversationBody: We could not find the chat for this gasp. Please try again from the conversation.
viewGasp.recordingFailedBody: Could not capture your reaction. Please try again.

errors.workingOnFix: We're working on fixing this. Please try again.
